title: Living in Boulder vlog 8 -  17 -  2017: 19.5mi 1:40:25 Time 2,464ft. Eusebius.

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs after a bike ride in Boulder on August 19, 2017, covering 19.5 miles with 2,464ft elevation. He recounts a ride up Flagstaff where his bike computer went into low-battery sleep mode, then discusses working on notes about ancient books (Eusebius), and reflects on the steep mountain terrain and his plans for tomorrow's ride.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: glad he did it despite the battery issue; found the steep 14% grade impressive
working through Eusebius as a productive afternoon activity he enjoys
fascinated by the terrain after having only looked at it on Google for a long time

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Today I went under Rye.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: In the afternoon, I was going to go up Flagstaff and then down the other side to the end of the road and come back.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: When I got to the top of the hill, my battery was low and it wasn't giving me any data.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I thought maybe my device wouldn't record my ride.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My device did record the whole ride.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went into sleep mode and managed to transfer the information.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I came back and wanted to work on finishing some ancient books.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It was a prelectic afternoon working on the books.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to Rye, then to my mom, and came back to work on the books.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was working on one of the books until early on.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It was time to sit down and try to finish up.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll zoom through and see if I get to somebody else's work, but it may not be complicated.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: There are lots of chapters and books.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I haven't been listening to anything really.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm too high.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm coming up on the end of the smoke and the weed.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was really fond of the bikes.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm fascinated to travel around the mountains after looking at them on Google for so long.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It was 14% steep, the steepest I've been on in my ride.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My bike is more than any part of a stunt shine or old stage.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I'll do that tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might start by doing a first step.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I could just do as many else as I can.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I consider it part of the first step.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I would have to do it today, but I forgot.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've been for the game department.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll set my monitor to play and remember that tomorrow.
